tasks.subject: Task 1: Extend UniversalPolicy_ShouldDropScmSip + close mode-2 deferred row
tasks.description:
See plan docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-20-universal-tz-rollback-drop.md Task 1. Files: UniversalBaseline.{h,c}, ScmHook.c (log strings only), mode-2 design doc.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/UniversalBaseline.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/UniversalBaseline.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ScmHook.c", "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-17-mode-2-design.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'DROP-CANDIDATE' GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ScmHook.c; ./build.sh --mode 1 && ./build.sh --mode 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UniversalPolicy_ShouldDropScmSip handles all 3 SmcIds with EFI_SUCCESS", "Each drop emits GBL_INFO 'DROPPED (universal)' line", "ScmHook.c free of 'DROP-CANDIDATE(NOT-DROPPED)' substring", "Mode-2 spec deferred-audit row closed", "build.sh succeeds for mode 1 and mode 2 with no new warnings"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: On-device verification on infiniti (user gate)
tasks.description:
See plan docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-20-universal-tz-rollback-drop.md Task 2. USER-ORDERED GATE.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".re-notes/sessions/2026-05-20-universal-tz-rollback-drop.md"], "verifyCommand": "cat .re-notes/sessions/2026-05-20-universal-tz-rollback-drop.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DROPPED (universal) log line for 0x32000110 or 0x0200011E observed on-device", "Mode-1 boots to lockscreen on infiniti", "Mode-2 boots to lockscreen on infiniti with both spoof and drop lines", "Keystore exercise post-boot has no KM_ERROR_*", "Power-cycle without re-staging keeps /data intact", "Evidence file written with PASS verdict", "PR opened on PASS"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "task", "failurePolicy": "halt-and-report"}
```
